purpose: Pretty JSON report mapping thirteen JSONWisdom repositories into the Living Library architecture with wisdom, family, civic, and replay roles preserved.

repo_set.selection_rule: Active Living Library and Wisdom-family repo surfaces named or repeatedly referenced by operator context.

repos.wisdom_function: coordinates doctrine, public proof scaffolds, replay-court issues, reports, and promotion gates
repos.recommended_update: Keep reports, doctrine, public proof coordination, prompt-and-promote protocol, and Democracy Epoch artifacts here.

repos.wisdom_function: front door and map explaining how all JSONWisdom repos relate
repos.recommended_update: Mirror a short pointer to this report after review; do not make orientation into proof.

repos.wisdom_function: schemas, receipts, replay, governance, and contestability machinery
repos.recommended_update: Mirror canonicalized registry entries only after review and replay rules are ready.

repos.wisdom_function: human meaning, continuity, family-safe witness context, and sister-network coordination
repos.recommended_update: Use as continuity witness surface; do not convert care into command authority.

repos.wisdom_function: named continuity branch in the Wisdom Living Library
repos.recommended_update: Add or preserve repo-local README pointer to JOY/Wisdom continuity rules after review.

repos.wisdom_function: named continuity branch in the Wisdom Living Library
repos.recommended_update: Add or preserve repo-local README pointer to JOY/Wisdom continuity rules after review.

repos.wisdom_function: named continuity branch in the Wisdom Living Library
repos.recommended_update: Verify repo exists before mutation; if present, add only non-authoritative continuity pointer after review.

repos.wisdom_function: learning receipts, purpose-driven schooling context, and family continuity
repos.recommended_update: Keep Alabama/purpose-driven schooling layers bounded: no accreditation, no custody, no legal authority claims.

repos.wisdom_function: named continuity branch in the Wisdom Living Library
repos.recommended_update: Add or preserve repo-local README pointer to JOY/Wisdom continuity rules after review.

repos.wisdom_function: supporting family/civic context surface within JSONWisdom repo constellation
repos.recommended_update: Index as supporting surface; do not assign proof authority without receipts.

repos.wisdom_function: county or local civic context surface for state-aware Democracy Math
repos.recommended_update: Use as geo-context pointer only until public records/replay receipts exist.

repos.wisdom_function: city/county/state civic context surface for public signal and Democracy Math work
repos.recommended_update: Use as jurisdiction context; avoid fraud claims without receipts.

repos.wisdom_function: local civic context surface for open courts, public replay, and state-aware indexing
repos.recommended_update: Use as local jurisdiction context; emit signals only after receipt-backed observations.

mrs_wisdom_summary.plain_english: The Wisdom repos form a Living Library: COMPUTERWISDOM coordinates, Welcome orients, AL records and tests, JOY witnesses continuity, family-named repos preserve human context, and geo-civic repos provide state-aware surfaces. Nothing here creates authority or promotion without receipts.
mrs_wisdom_summary.root_rule: Prompt with purpose. Promote with proof.
